shaft-mcp, 10.2.20260617

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BrowserService
     
    BrowserType
    Supported browser types for SHAFT WebDriver initialization.
    CaptureService
    MCP adapter for deterministic managed-browser SHAFT Capture recording.
    DoctorService
    MCP adapter for deterministic SHAFT Doctor analysis with optional configured provider advisory.
    ElementService
    MCP-safe element actions.
    EngineService
     
    locatorStrategy
    Locator strategies for finding elements on a web page.
    McpActionRecord
    Actionable remediation item returned by MCP analysis.
    McpActionRecord.Status
    Action status.
    McpAnalysisReport
    Local-stdio MCP report for failed Allure analysis and remediation snippets.
    McpAnalysisReport.Status
    Report status.
    McpCaptureReplayResult
    MCP result for Capture generation, replay, and reusable code snippets.
    McpCodeBlock
    Safe copy-paste code block returned by local MCP remediation tools.
    McpCodeBlock.Kind
    Code block type.
    McpMobileAccessibilityTree
    Mobile accessibility tree or current Appium page source returned for MCP inspection.
    McpMobileActionResult
    Mobile action result returned by MCP mobile tools.
    McpMobileContextSnapshot
    Current Appium context state for native, hybrid, or mobile web sessions.
    McpMobileRecordedAction
    Persisted MCP mobile action for deterministic replay generation.
    McpMobileRecording
    Persisted MCP mobile action recording.
    McpMobileRecordingStatus
    Status for MCP mobile action recording.
    McpMobileReplayResult
    Result for MCP mobile recording code generation or replay.
    McpMobileSessionResult
    Mobile session setup result returned by MCP mobile tools.
    McpNaturalActionResult
    Result metadata returned after a trust-gated natural action.
    McpPageDomSnapshot
    Browser DOM snapshot returned by the MCP browser inspection tools.
    McpProviderFallback
    Safe provider metadata for optional AI fallback.
    McpScreenshotResult
    Browser screenshot payload returned by the MCP browser inspection tools.
    MobileService
    MCP tools for mobile web emulation, Appium native sessions, and SHAFT touch actions.
    NaturalActionService
    MCP entry point for trust-gated SHAFT natural-language actions.
    ShaftMcpApplication
